title: gagea oxycarpa
intro: Gagea oxycarpa, also known as the autumnal gagea, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae). It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gagea oxycarpa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its ability to combat bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Gagea oxycarpa are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
